fixture_note: RECORDED LLM-gate verdicts for the zero-key `engine fixture-run` (release-spec §5.4). Freshly authored synthetic Acme Cosmos content — never copied from a production run (§18.2(6)). The fixture run REPLAYS these instead of calling an LLM (RD-12 zero-key bar): the deterministic pre-gate (pre-gate-lint) runs LIVE over draft.json and emits its codes; these recorded llm-voice + llm-quality stages are layered on top. Each stage object conforms to schemas/artifacts/validation-result.schema.json (additionalProperties:true, so the recorded_fixture/fixture_note labels are schema-legal here). The bundle DEMONSTRATES the union-of-codes contract (DD-3): the final stage carries forward every earlier detection and the LLM adds (never drops) codes — including one SOFT warn with bars_recommended on an alternate variant.

stages.rationale: Deterministic pre-gate clean (this stage is produced LIVE by engine/gate/pre-gate-lint.js during the fixture run; recorded here for reference and to anchor the union baseline).
Voice sub-stage: on-lane builder-recap register, operator-conviction, non-substitutable on the Recommended and Variant A. No voice codes added.

detected_codes.explanation: ADVISORY note on Variant B: it asserts the deadline+public-output rule is why builders met both — a causal link between two individually-verified facts. Non-blocking; rides onto the card. Does NOT bar Recommended.

Variant B leans toward a by-the-numbers recap framing rather than leading with the thesis. SOFT/warn; bars Variant B from being the Recommended pick (it remains A/B-eligible). The chosen Recommended variant is code-clean.

stages.rationale: Quality sub-stage: the Recommended variant is code-clean and leads with the thesis its receipts evidence. Variant B picks up one advisory (FM.UNVERIFIED_CAUSAL, non-blocking) and one soft warn (FM.STATUS_RECAP, bars_recommended) — so the union verdict is PASS_ALTERNATE_ONLY at the variant level, but the Recommended pick is clean and Recommended-eligible.

detected_codes.explanation: Carried forward (union contract): advisory causal note on Variant B.
Carried forward (union contract): soft warn that bars Variant B from the Recommended slot.

final_verdict.rationale: Union of all stages (DD-3): the live pre-gate found no hard codes; the LLM added two SOFT codes on Variant B and dropped none. Verdict PASS_ALTERNATE_ONLY — a soft code bars one alternate, but the Recommended pick is code-clean, so the package proceeds with Recommended as the named pick.
